name.description: The name of the Cosmos DB Mongo Collection

account_name.description: The name of the Cosmos DB Mongo Account

database_name.description: The name of the Cosmos DB Mongo Database

shard_key.description: The name of the key to partition on for sharding. There must not be any other unique index keys.

default_ttl_seconds.description: The default time to live for the Cosmos DB Mongo Collection

throughput.description: The throughput for the Cosmos DB Mongo Collection

keys.description: Specifies the list of user settable index keys for each Cosmos DB Mongo Collections

unique.description: Are the index keys unique or not?

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
